Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species.reason: Results explicitly state similar expression at 10 and 20 DAT, divergence beginning at 30 DAT, persistent elevation in Tanzania, and no expression detected in Beauregard storage roots at 50 DAT.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: Paper uses QTL colocalization, physical proximity/linkage to PSY, and RNA-seq differential expression.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: All three listed points are explicitly described in Results: LG3 QTL context, 12.2 kb linkage to PSY with no intervening genes, and 30 DAT storage-root differential expression (log2fc -2.59, adj. p 1.8E-12).
